attacks.name: Vital Drain
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokemon is Knocked Out by this attack, remove all Special Conditions and damage counters from Kabutops.

attacks.name: Thunderous Blow
attacks.text: Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each Lightning Energy attached to Kabutops.

tests.name: vital_drain_heals_on_ko
tests.description: Test that Vital Drain heals Kabutops when KOing defender

tests.name: thunderous_blow_scales
tests.description: Test that Thunderous Blow adds +10 per Lightning Energy
